Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Director Porellus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Porellus is a giant, beige slug-like creature with two pairs of arms and many pseudo-legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Porellus has a lower pair of hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Director Porellus is a Director who roared for security.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Director Porellus has the authority to suspend the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Director Porellus is a slug-like individual with pale skin and tendrils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Director Porellus is an Archmage with a bulbous body and tiny tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Director Porellus has beetle eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Director Porellus wears a mantle that is like an ornate scarf with metal scales sewn into it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Director Porellus uses wands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — Director Porellus was paid off to keep Tower security busy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — Porellus is a Director at the Magic Tower.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
